issues.description: Card has two distinct effects but effects array is empty. First effect: conditional cost reduction (−3 cost if opponent has at least 2 more DON!! than you). Second effect: Blocker keyword with its triggered ability.

Missing first effect: cost reduction trigger. Should trigger OnPlay or as a static condition checking HasAttachedDon counts (your field vs opponent field). Condition: opponent's DON!! count ≥ your DON!! count + 2. Action: PowerBoost with −3 cost modifier.
Missing second effect: Blocker keyword mechanic. Should be OnAttacked trigger allowing rest action to redirect attack target to this card.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If the number of DON!! cards on your field is at least 2 less than the number on your opponent's field, give this card in your hand −3 cost. [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)
